get.summary: Returns all data centers supported by the API.
Returns the IDs and names of all worlds supported by the API.

Retrieves aggregated market board data for the given items.
Up to 100 item IDs can be comma-separated in order to retrieve data for multiple items at once.
AverageSalePrice and DailySaleVelocity are calculated based on sales of the last 4 days.
This API uses only cached values and is therefore strongly preferred over CurrentlyShown if individual sales/listings are not required.

parameters.name: itemIds
parameters.description: The item ID or comma-separated item IDs to retrieve data for.

parameters.name: worldDcRegion
parameters.description: The world, data center, or region to retrieve data for. This may be an ID or a name. Regions should be specified as Japan, Europe, North-America, Oceania, China, or 中国.

404.description:
The world/DC or item requested is invalid. When requesting multiple items at once, an invalid item ID
will not trigger this. Instead, the returned list of unresolved item IDs will contain the invalid item ID or IDs.

get.summary:
Returns the content object associated with the provided content ID. Please note that this endpoint is largely untested,
and may return inconsistent data at times.

parameters.name: contentId
parameters.description: The ID of the content object to retrieve.

get.summary: Get the least-recently updated items on the specified world or data center, along with the upload times for each item.

parameters.name: world
parameters.description: The world to request data for.

parameters.name: dcName
parameters.description: The data center to request data for.

parameters.name: entries
parameters.description: The number of entries to return (default 50, max 200).

get.summary:
Retrieves the data currently shown on the market board for the requested item and world or data center.
Up to 100 item IDs can be comma-separated in order to retrieve data for multiple items at once.

parameters.name: itemIds
parameters.description: The item ID or comma-separated item IDs to retrieve data for.

parameters.name: worldDcRegion
parameters.description: The world, data center, or region to retrieve data for. This may be an ID or a name. Regions should be specified as Japan, Europe, North-America, Oceania, China, or 中国.

parameters.name: listings
parameters.description: The number of listings to return per item. By default, all listings will be returned.

parameters.name: entries
parameters.description: The number of recent history entries to return per item. By default, a maximum of 5 entries will be returned.

parameters.name: hq
parameters.description: Filter for HQ listings and entries. By default, both HQ and NQ listings and entries will be returned.

parameters.name: statsWithin
parameters.description: The amount of time before now to calculate stats over, in milliseconds. By default, this is 7 days.

parameters.name: entriesWithin
parameters.description: The amount of time before now to take entries within, in seconds. Negative values will be ignored.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description:
A comma separated list of fields that should be included in the response, if omitted will return all fields.
For example, if you're only interested in the listings price per unit you can set this to listings.pricePerUnit.
Note that querying multiple items changes the response schema, which should be reflected in the value provided
for this field. In this case, querying the price per unit requires setting this field to
items.listings.pricePerUnit.

404.description:
The world/DC or item requested is invalid. When requesting multiple items at once, an invalid item ID
will not trigger this. Instead, the returned list of unresolved item IDs will contain the invalid item ID or IDs.

get.summary:
Retrieves the history data for the requested item and world or data center.
Up to 100 item IDs can be comma-separated in order to retrieve data for multiple items at once.

parameters.name: itemIds
parameters.description: The item ID or comma-separated item IDs to retrieve data for.

parameters.name: worldDcRegion
parameters.description: The world or data center to retrieve data for. This may be an ID or a name. Regions should be specified as Japan, Europe, North-America, Oceania, China, or 中国.

parameters.name: entriesToReturn
parameters.description: The number of entries to return per item. By default, this is set to 1800, but may be set to a maximum of 99999.

parameters.name: statsWithin
parameters.description: The amount of time before now to calculate stats over, in milliseconds. By default, this is 7 days.

parameters.name: entriesWithin
parameters.description: The amount of time before entriesUntil or now to take entries within, in seconds. Negative values will be ignored. By default, this is 7 days.

parameters.name: entriesUntil
parameters.description: The UNIX timestamp in seconds to take entries until. Negative values will be ignored. By default, this is current time.

parameters.name: minSalePrice
parameters.description: The inclusive minimum unit sale price of entries to return.

parameters.name: maxSalePrice
parameters.description: The inclusive maximum unit sale price of entries to return.

404.description:
The world/DC or item requested is invalid. When requesting multiple items at once, an invalid item ID
will not trigger this. Instead, the returned list of unresolved item IDs will contain the invalid item ID or IDs.

get.summary: Retrieves the current tax rate data for the specified world. This data is provided by the Retainer Vocate in each major city.

parameters.name: world
parameters.description: The world or to retrieve data for. This may be an ID or a name.

get.summary: Returns the set of marketable item IDs.
Get the most-recently updated items on the specified world or data center, along with the upload times for each item.

parameters.name: world
parameters.description: The world to request data for.

parameters.name: dcName
parameters.description: The data center to request data for.

parameters.name: entries
parameters.description: The number of entries to return (default 50, max 200).

get.summary:
Returns a list of some of the most recently updated items on the website. This endpoint
is a legacy endpoint and does not include any data on which worlds or data centers the updates happened on.
Returns the total upload counts for each client application that uploads data to Universalis.
Returns the world upload counts and proportions of the total uploads for each world.
Returns the number of uploads per day over the past 30 days.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: The ID of the list to retrieve.

404.description: The list requested does not exist.

get.summary: Connect to the WebSocket endpoint of the API. Requires a valid WebSocket client.
Connect to the WebSocket dev endpoint of the API. Requires a valid WebSocket client.

lastUploadTime.description: The last upload time for this endpoint, in milliseconds since the UNIX epoch.

regularSaleVelocity.description:
The average number of sales per day, over the past seven days (or the entirety of the shown sales, whichever comes first).
This number will tend to be the same for every item, because the number of shown sales is the same and over the same period.
This statistic is more useful in historical queries.

nqSaleVelocity.description:
The average number of NQ sales per day, over the past seven days (or the entirety of the shown sales, whichever comes first).
This number will tend to be the same for every item, because the number of shown sales is the same and over the same period.
This statistic is more useful in historical queries.

hqSaleVelocity.description:
The average number of HQ sales per day, over the past seven days (or the entirety of the shown sales, whichever comes first).
This number will tend to be the same for every item, because the number of shown sales is the same and over the same period.
This statistic is more useful in historical queries.

stackSizeHistogram.description: A map of quantities to listing counts, representing the number of listings of each quantity.

stackSizeHistogramNQ.description: A map of quantities to NQ listing counts, representing the number of listings of each quantity.

stackSizeHistogramHQ.description: A map of quantities to HQ listing counts, representing the number of listings of each quantity.

worldUploadTimes.description: The last upload times in milliseconds since epoch for each world in the response, if this is a DC request.

listingsCount.description:
The number of listings retrieved for the request. When using the "listings" limit parameter, this may be
different from the number of sale entries returned in an API response.

recentHistoryCount.description:
The number of sale entries retrieved for the request. When using the "entries" limit parameter, this may be
different from the number of sale entries returned in an API response.

unitsForSale.description: The number of items (not listings) up for sale.

unitsSold.description: The number of items (not sale entries) sold over the retrieved sales.

hasData.description: Whether this item has ever been updated. Useful for newly-released items.

contentID.description: The content ID of the object.

contentType.description: The content type of this object.

characterName.description: The character name associated with this character object, if this is one.

items.description: A list of item upload information in timestamp-descending order.
A list of item IDs, with the most recent first.

sourceName.description: The name of the client application.

uploadCount.description: The number of uploads originating from the client application.

uploadCountByDay.description: The list of upload counts per day, over the past 30 days.

lastUploadTime.description: The last upload time for the item on the listed world.

count.description: The number of times an upload has occurred on this world.

proportion.description: The proportion of uploads on this world to the total number of uploads.

lastUploadTime.description: The last upload time for this endpoint, in milliseconds since the UNIX epoch.

stackSizeHistogram.description: A map of quantities to sale counts, representing the number of sales of each quantity.

stackSizeHistogramNQ.description: A map of quantities to NQ sale counts, representing the number of sales of each quantity.

stackSizeHistogramHQ.description: A map of quantities to HQ sale counts, representing the number of sales of each quantity.

regularSaleVelocity.description: The average number of sales per day, over the past seven days (or the entirety of the shown sales, whichever comes first).

nqSaleVelocity.description: The average number of NQ sales per day, over the past seven days (or the entirety of the shown sales, whichever comes first).

hqSaleVelocity.description: The average number of HQ sales per day, over the past seven days (or the entirety of the shown sales, whichever comes first).

lastReviewTime.description: The time that this listing was posted, in seconds since the UNIX epoch.

stainID.description: The ID of the dye on this item.

creatorID.description: A SHA256 hash of the creator's ID.

hq.description: Whether or not the item is high-quality.

isCrafted.description: Whether or not the item is crafted.

onMannequin.description: Whether or not the item is being sold on a mannequin.

retainerCity.description:
The city ID of the retainer. This is a game ID; all possible values can be seen at
https://xivapi.com/Town.
            
Limsa Lominsa = 1
Gridania = 2
Ul'dah = 3
Ishgard = 4
Kugane = 7
Crystarium = 10
Old Sharlayan = 12

sellerID.description: A SHA256 hash of the seller's ID.

tax.description: The Gil sales tax (GST) to be added to the total price during purchase.

hq.description: Whether or not the item was high-quality.

buyerName.description: The buyer's character name. This may be null.

onMannequin.description: Whether or not this was purchased from a mannequin. This may be null.

timestamp.description: The sale time, in seconds since the UNIX epoch.

hq.description: Whether or not the item was high-quality.

timestamp.description: The sale time, in seconds since the UNIX epoch.

onMannequin.description: Whether or not this was purchased from a mannequin. This may be null.

Limsa Lominsa.description: The percent retainer tax in Limsa Lominsa.

Gridania.description: The percent retainer tax in Gridania.

Ul'dah.description: The percent retainer tax in Ul'dah.

Ishgard.description: The percent retainer tax in Ishgard.

Kugane.description: The percent retainer tax in Kugane.

Crystarium.description: The percent retainer tax in the Crystarium.

Old Sharlayan.description: The percent retainer tax in Old Sharlayan.

Tuliyollal.description: The percent retainer tax in Tuliyollal.

itemIDs.description: The item IDs that were requested.

items.description: The item data that was requested, keyed on the item ID.

worldID.description: The ID of the world requested, if applicable.

dcName.description: The name of the DC requested, if applicable.

regionName.description: The name of the region requested, if applicable.

unresolvedItems.description: A list of IDs that could not be resolved to any item data.

worldName.description: The name of the world requested, if applicable.

itemIDs.description: The item IDs that were requested.

items.description: The item data that was requested, keyed on the item ID.

worldID.description: The ID of the world requested, if applicable.

dcName.description: The name of the DC requested, if applicable.

regionName.description: The name of the region requested, if applicable.

unresolvedItems.description: A list of IDs that could not be resolved to any item data.

worldName.description: The name of the world requested, if applicable.

created.description: The time that this list was created, in milliseconds since the UNIX epoch.

updated.description: The time that this list was updated, in milliseconds since the UNIX epoch.

itemIDs.description: The IDs of the list items.
